zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfield於1535年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾洛恰阿布利格斯時，他的父親James Douglas28歲，母親Lady Marion Johnstone21歲。他於1553年與Mrs John Charteris結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1577年3月5日在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安阿米斯費爾德享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfield于1535年出生在苏格兰度福利爾洛恰阿布利格斯时，他的父亲James Douglas28岁，母亲Lady Marion Johnstone21岁。他于1553年与Mrs John Charteris结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1577年3月5日在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安阿米斯費爾德享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Charteris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, Scottish: from the city of Chartres in N France; see Charters .

variants.name: Charters
meanings: Scottish (Kirkcudbrightshire) and northern English: habitational name of Norman origin from the French city of Chartres, named for a Gaulish tribe, recorded in Latin sources as the Carnutes, whose seat it was.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfield was born in 1535, in Locharbriggs, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, James Douglas, was 28 and his mother, Lady Marion Johnstone, was 21. He married Mrs John Charteris in 1553. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 5 March 1577, in Amisfield, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfield est né en 1535, à Locharbriggs, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, James Douglas, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Marion Johnstone, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mrs John Charteris en 1553. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 5 mars 1577, à Amisfield, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfield 1535 in Locharbriggs, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Douglas 28 und seine Mutter Lady Marion Johnstone 21. Er hat 1553 Mrs John Charteris geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 5. März 1577 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Amisfield, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfield è nato il nel 1535 nel Locharbriggs, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, James Douglas, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Lady Marion Johnstone, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Mrs John Charteris nel 1553. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 5 marzo 1577, nel Amisfield, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfieldが1535年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアロチャーブリググズで生まれた時，父James Douglasは28歳，母Lady Marion Johnstoneは21歳であった。1553年にMrs John Charterisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1577年3月5日にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンアミスフィールドで42歳で死去した。

ko.Dumfries, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotlan: 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 드프리스
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfield(이)가 1535년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 럭아르브리그스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Douglas(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Marion Johnstone(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1553년 Mrs John Charteris(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1577년 3월 5일 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 아미스필드에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfield nasceu em 1535, em Locharbriggs, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, James Douglas, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Marion Johnstone, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs John Charteris em 1553. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 5 de março de 1577, em Amisfield, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 42 anos.

ru.Dumfries, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotlan: думфриесь, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfield родился в 1535 г. в местности лочарбригс, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени James Douglas было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Marion Johnstone, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs John Charteris в 1553 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 5 марта 1577 г. в местности амисфиелд, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfield nació en 1535, en Locharbriggs, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, James Douglas, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Marion Johnstone, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Mrs John Charteris en 1553. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 5 de marzo de 1577, en Amisfield, East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años.
